summary: Iteration 26: Tested Analytics Random Sampling and Variance Drilldown features. Backend: 12/13 tests passed (1 skipped due to insufficient data for sorting verification). All new endpoints working correctly - GET /api/analytics/random-sample returns pool_size, sample_size, samples array, and filter_options. GET /api/analytics/variance-drilldown returns per-submission variance details. Both endpoints correctly require owner role (403 for management). Frontend: All UI components present and functional - Random Sampling card with filter dropdowns, Draw Sample button, sample table with color-coded variance. Heatmap cells are clickable and open variance drilldown panel. AI placeholder card shows 'Coming Soon' with all badges. Theme compatibility verified with Gold theme.
test_credentials: Owner: sadam.owner@slmco.local / SLMCo2026!, Management: hjohnny.super@slmco.local / SLMCo2026!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 verified new Analytics features: (1) Random Sampling card (data-testid='analytics-sampling-card') with filter dropdowns for Crew/Division/Service Type/Sample Size and Draw Sample button (data-testid='sample-draw-button'). Sample table (data-testid='sample-table') shows Crew, Service, Mgmt, Owner, Variance, Status columns with color-coded variance. (2) Calibration Heatmap cells are clickable buttons that open variance drilldown panel (data-testid='variance-drilldown-panel') with per-submission details. Close button (data-testid='drilldown-close') works. (3) AI placeholder card (data-testid='analytics-ai-placeholder-card') shows 'Coming Soon' with Auto-grading, Anomaly detection, Calibration drift badges. Backend endpoints: GET /api/analytics/random-sample (owner-only, supports crew/division/service_type/size/period filters), GET /api/analytics/variance-drilldown (owner-only, requires crew and service_type params). Both return 403 for management role.

random_sample_endpoint.basic_request: PASS - Returns pool_size, sample_size, samples array, filter_options
random_sample_endpoint.crew_filter: PASS - Filters samples by crew correctly
random_sample_endpoint.sample_structure: PASS - All expected fields present (submission_id, crew, division, service_type, status, management_score, owner_score, variance, etc.)

variance_drilldown_endpoint.basic_request: PASS - Returns crew, service_type, period, total_reviewed, rows
variance_drilldown_endpoint.row_structure: PASS - All expected fields present (submission_id, created_at, management_score, owner_score, variance, etc.)
variance_drilldown_endpoint.sorted_by_variance: SKIPPED - Not enough rows to verify sorting

analytics_summary.has_heatmap: PASS - calibration_heatmap array present with correct structure
analytics_summary.period_options: PASS - All 5 period options work (daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, annual)

frontend_random_sampling.filter_dropdowns: PASS - Crew, Division, Service Type, Sample Size dropdowns present
frontend_random_sampling.sample_table: PASS - data-testid='sample-table' appears with all columns
frontend_random_sampling.variance_color_coding: PASS - Variance values color-coded (green for low, yellow for moderate, red for high)

frontend_heatmap_drilldown.clickable_cells: PASS - Cells with data are clickable
frontend_heatmap_drilldown.drilldown_panel: PASS - data-testid='variance-drilldown-panel' opens on cell click
frontend_heatmap_drilldown.drilldown_table: PASS - data-testid='drilldown-table' shows all columns (Date, Mgmt Score, Owner Score, Variance, Rating, Training, Issues)

frontend_ai_placeholder.badges: PASS - Auto-grading, Anomaly detection, Calibration drift badges present

theme_compatibility.gold_theme: PASS - All new sections render correctly with Gold theme
theme_compatibility.text_contrast: PASS - Text is readable on all backgrounds

period_buttons.clickable: PASS - Period buttons change data window

mocked_apis.ai_scoring: AI-assisted scoring card is a static 'Coming Soon' placeholder with no backend calls - this is intentional per requirements
